description: The Chinook music store database is open in LibreOffice Base. Set up security roles for the library staff by creating three users with specific permissions. Create user REFDESK (Password: "refdesk2024") with SELECT access on all 11 tables (Artist, Album, Track, Genre, MediaType, Playlist, PlaylistTrack, Customer, Employee, Invoice, InvoiceLine). Create user CATALOGER (Password: "catalog2024") with SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE permissions on the 7 content tables (Artist, Album, Track, Genre, MediaType, Playlist, PlaylistTrack) and SELECT permission on the 4 financial/admin tables (Customer, Employee, Invoice, InvoiceLine). Create user LIBADMIN (Password: "admin2024") with the DBA role. Save the database to persist these changes.
